title: Verify feedback injection mechanism for --feedback flag
description: Verification test for @kody --feedback flag injection mechanism. The test confirms that: (1) FEEDBACK env var is propagated to orchestrate job, (2) --feedback flag is passed with proper shell escaping, (3) feedback text appears in build stage logs. The retry utility at src/utils/retry.ts and tests at src/utils/retry.test.ts already exist.
existing_patterns: src/utils/retry.ts - single-function retry utility with RetryOptions interface and configurable exponential backoff
src/utils/retry.test.ts - vitest with fake timers, comprehensive edge case coverage
.github/workflows/kody.yml line 207 - FEEDBACK env var propagation to orchestrate job
.github/workflows/kody.yml line 263 - --feedback flag passed via ARGS with proper shell escaping
